feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty (Archery, Defense, etc.).

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description: Bonus action to regain HP equal to 1d10 + fighter level. Once per short/long rest.

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description: Take one additional action on your turn. Once per short/long rest.

feat_fig_archetype.name: Martial Archetype
feat_fig_archetype.description: Choose a Martial Archetype that defines your combat style.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_fig_asi.description: Increase one score by 2 or two by 1.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: Attack multiple times when you take the Attack action.

feat_aa_lore.name: Arcane Archer Lore
feat_aa_lore.description: Gain proficiency in Arcana or Nature, and learn Prestidigitation or Druidcraft.

feat_aa_shot.name: Arcane Shot
feat_aa_shot.description: Apply magical effects to your arrows. Uses Arcane Shot options.

feat_aa_magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
feat_aa_magic_arrow.description: Arrows fired from a shortbow or longbow are considered magical.

feat_aa_curving_shot.name: Curving Shot
feat_aa_curving_shot.description: Use a bonus action to redirect a missed arrow to another target.

feat_aa_ready_shot.name: Ever-Ready Shot
feat_aa_ready_shot.description: Regain one use of Arcane Shot if you start combat with none.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: An expert in blending elven archery with powerful arcane magic.
